dev.inverter.desc: Microinverter status, model and writable controls
dev.dtu.desc: DTU identity, firmware and radio parameters
dev.alarms.desc: Currently active alarms and last alarm metadata (local only)
dev.config.desc: DTU runtime configuration as reported by GetConfig (local only)
dev.deviceInfo.desc: Device-level info wrapper containing connected and lastResponse states
dev.meter.desc: Three-phase energy meter readings (local, only when meter is connected)
dev.history.desc: Power history payload from the inverter (local only)
dev.grid.power.desc: Total instantaneous AC power output to the grid (W)
dev.grid.voltage.desc: AC line voltage measured at the inverter output (V)
dev.grid.current.desc: AC line current at the inverter output (A, local only)
dev.grid.reactivePower.desc: Reactive power exchanged with the grid (var, local only)
dev.grid.powerFactor.desc: Cosine of the phase angle between AC voltage and current (-1..1, local only)
dev.grid.dailyEnergy.desc: Energy delivered to the grid since 00:00 local time today (kWh, local only)
dev.inverter.powerLimit.desc: Active-power output limit in % of rated capacity (writable, 0–100)
dev.inverter.activePowerLimit.desc: Currently effective active-power limit reported by the inverter (%, local only)
dev.inverter.active.desc: Master on/off switch for the inverter (writable, local only)
dev.inverter.reboot.desc: One-shot button: reboot the inverter (writable, local only)
dev.inverter.powerFactorLimit.desc: Power-factor command (-1..1; -1 inductive, +1 capacitive; writable, local only)
dev.inverter.reactivePowerLimit.desc: Reactive-power phase angle limit in degrees (-50..50; writable, local only)
dev.inverter.cleanWarnings.desc: One-shot button: clear all currently latched warning codes (writable, local only)
dev.inverter.cleanGroundingFault.desc: One-shot button: clear a latched grounding-fault flag (writable, local only)
dev.inverter.lock.desc: Inverter lock switch — when on, the inverter ignores remote commands (writable, local only)
dev.inverter.warnCount.desc: Currently active warning code from the inverter (0 = no warning, local only)
dev.inverter.warnMessage.desc: Human-readable description of the active warning code (local only)
dev.inverter.linkStatus.desc: Numeric link/connection status reported by the inverter
dev.inverter.model.desc: Inverter model identifier (e.g. HMS-800W-2T, cloud only)
dev.dtu.fwUpdateAvailable.desc: True when Hoymiles cloud has a newer firmware available for this DTU (cloud only)
dev.dtu.serialNumber.desc: DTU serial number — used as the device id in ioBroker
dev.dtu.rssi.desc: WiFi signal strength of the DTU's connection to the access point in dBm (local only)
dev.dtu.reboot.desc: One-shot button: reboot the DTU (writable, local only)
dev.dtu.stepTime.desc: Internal poll step time of the DTU in seconds (local only)
dev.dtu.rfHwVersion.desc: Hardware version of the DTU's RF (Sub-1G) module (local only)
dev.dtu.rfSwVersion.desc: Firmware version of the DTU's RF (Sub-1G) module (local only)
dev.dtu.accessModel.desc: Network type the DTU uses to reach the cloud (0 GPRS, 1 WiFi, 2 Ethernet; local only)
dev.dtu.communicationTime.desc: Unix timestamp of the last successful local TCP packet (local only)
dev.dtu.connState.desc: DTU error/connection state code (0 = OK; local only)
dev.dtu.mode485.desc: RS485 operating mode (0 reflux/auto, 1 remote control; local only)
dev.dtu.sub1gFrequencyBand.desc: Sub-1G radio frequency band identifier (local only)
dev.dtu.searchResult.desc: JSON list of inverter serials discovered by AutoSearch (local only)
dev.info.connected.desc: True while at least one transport (local TCP and/or cloud match) is reachable for this DTU
dev.info.lastResponse.desc: Unix timestamp of the last response received from the DTU (local only)
dev.alarms.count.desc: Total number of alarms ever recorded for this DTU (local only)
dev.alarms.activeCount.desc: Number of currently active (unacknowledged) alarms (local only)
dev.alarms.hasActive.desc: Convenience boolean: true when activeCount > 0 (local only)
dev.alarms.lastCode.desc: Hoymiles alarm code of the most recent alarm (local only)
dev.alarms.lastMessage.desc: Human-readable description of the most recent alarm (local only)
dev.alarms.lastStartTime.desc: Unix timestamp when the most recent alarm started (local only)
dev.alarms.lastEndTime.desc: Unix timestamp when the most recent alarm ended; 0 while active (local only)
dev.alarms.lastData1.desc: Raw sensor reading 1 captured at the time of the most recent alarm (local only)
dev.alarms.lastData2.desc: Raw sensor reading 2 captured at the time of the most recent alarm (local only)
dev.alarms.json.desc: JSON array of all alarms with code, message, start/end timestamps and raw data (local only)
dev.config.serverDomain.desc: Hoymiles cloud server hostname the DTU connects to (local only)
dev.config.serverPort.desc: TCP port used for the cloud uplink (local only)
dev.config.serverSendTime.desc: Interval at which the DTU sends realtime data to the cloud (minutes; writable, local only)
dev.config.zeroExportEnable.desc: Zero-export mode — when on, the inverter throttles output to avoid feeding to the grid (writable, local only)
dev.config.meterKind.desc: Meter wiring/protocol used by the DTU (single/two/three-phase, CT, G3 variants; local only)
dev.config.netmodeSelect.desc: Configured network mode (0 GPRS, 1 WiFi, 2 Ethernet; local only)
dev.config.netDhcpSwitch.desc: DHCP enabled flag for the wired network interface (local only)
dev.pv.field.power.desc: Instantaneous DC power produced by PV input %s (W)
dev.pv.field.voltage.desc: DC voltage measured at PV input %s (V)
dev.pv.field.dailyEnergy.desc: Energy produced by PV input %s today (kWh; local only)
dev.pv.field.totalEnergy.desc: Lifetime energy produced by PV input %s (kWh; local only)
dev.meter.totalPower.desc: Sum of active power across all phases reported by the energy meter (W; local only)
dev.meter.powerFactorTotal.desc: Total power factor across all phases (-1..1; local only)
dev.meter.energyTotalExport.desc: Lifetime energy exported to the grid via the meter (kWh; local only)
dev.meter.energyTotalImport.desc: Lifetime energy imported from the grid via the meter (kWh; local only)
dev.meter.faultCode.desc: Numeric fault code reported by the energy meter (0 = no fault; local only)
dev.history.json.desc: Compressed JSON of the per-step power history array (Wh values; local only)
dev.history.dailyEnergy.desc: Today's accumulated energy as derived from the history array (Wh; local only)
dev.history.totalEnergy.desc: Lifetime total energy reported alongside the history array (kWh; local only)
dev.history.stepTime.desc: Time interval between adjacent samples in the history array (seconds; local only)
sta.grid.desc: Cloud-aggregated grid output for the entire station
sta.weather.desc: Current weather at the station's geographic location (cloud only)
sta.grid.power.desc: Total instantaneous AC power produced by all inverters in the station (W)
sta.grid.dailyEnergy.desc: Total energy delivered today by the station (kWh)
sta.grid.monthEnergy.desc: Total energy delivered this month by the station (kWh)
sta.grid.yearEnergy.desc: Total energy delivered this year by the station (kWh)
sta.grid.totalEnergy.desc: Lifetime total AC energy produced by the station (kWh)
sta.grid.co2Saved.desc: Estimated CO₂ emissions avoided by the station's lifetime production (kg)
sta.grid.treesPlanted.desc: Trees-planted equivalent for the station's CO₂ savings (Hoymiles cloud metric)
sta.grid.isBalance.desc: Cloud-reported flag: zero-export mode is currently effective for the station
sta.grid.isReflux.desc: Cloud-reported flag: the station is currently feeding energy back to the grid
sta.grid.electricityPrice.desc: Tariff per kWh used by the cloud to estimate income (currency unit defined by `currency`)
sta.grid.todayIncome.desc: Estimated revenue from today's production (electricityPrice × dailyEnergy)
sta.grid.totalIncome.desc: Estimated lifetime revenue from the station's total production
sta.info.stationStatus.desc: Cloud-reported station status (0 offline, 30 producing, 50 fault, …)
sta.info.systemCapacity.desc: Total nominal capacity of the station's installed inverters (kWp)
sta.info.lastCloudUpdate.desc: Unix timestamp of the most recent realtime poll from the cloud
sta.info.lastDataTime.desc: Unix timestamp the cloud last received fresh data from any DTU in the station
sta.weather.icon.desc: OpenWeatherMap-style icon code (e.g. 01d, 10n) for the station's current sky
sta.weather.description.desc: Localised text description of the current weather (rendered in the adapter language)
sta.weather.temperature.desc: Outdoor temperature at the station's location (°C)
sta.weather.sunrise.desc: Sunrise time at the station's location (Unix timestamp in ms)
sta.weather.sunset.desc: Sunset time at the station's location (Unix timestamp in ms)
